source: NSE published 2026 trading holiday list (equity segment), cross-checked against Zerodha and ClearTax holiday calendars

holidays.reason: Prakash Gurpurb Sri Guru Nanak Dev

notes: Muhurat trading (Diwali Laxmi Pujan) falls on Sunday 2026-11-08 — already a weekend, no separate holiday entry needed; exact one-hour session timing to be announced by NSE closer to the date (ORCHESTRATION §2 — treat as a holiday-page note, no special pipeline).
Shri Ram Navami (Mar 26, Thursday) shifts the March monthly derivatives expiry to Wednesday Mar 25.
Bakri Id (May 28, Thursday) shifts the May monthly derivatives expiry to Wednesday May 27.
